PUZZLE GAME - QUICK START GUIDE
==============================

GOAL
----
To win the game:
- Eliminate all enemies
- Activate all colored tiles

Fewer turns = better score

--------------------------------------------------------------------

GAME PIECES
---------
Shapes: 
- They form the player's hand (bottom of screen) and can be played onto the board.
- Vary in shape and element (ice/blue, fire/orange, wind/white)
Colored Tiles:
- Certain Tiles on the board are colored (ice/blue, fire/orange, wind/white)
- Can be turned on by shapes of the same color, or off by the rest
Enemies:
- Colorful elemental entities (ice/blue, fire/orange, rock/grey)

--------------------------------------------------------------------

CONTROLS
---------
Click shape in hand → rotate it
Drag shape → place it on the board
Click placed shape → remove it
Press EXECUTE → resolve and end the turn

--------------------------------------------------------------------

TURN FLOW
---------
1. Place as many shapes as you like
2. Press EXECUTE
3. All pieces resolve in sequence automatically
	1. First wind pushes pieces inside one tile in the same direction
	2. Then all enemies and tiles are deleted or activated accordingly

Note: Pushing enemies into other objects destroys them, leaving that enemy in their place

Plan combinations before ending your turn.


TYPES OF OBSTACLES
------

Colored Tiles
- Must be active to win
- Activate when covered by a same element shape
- Deactivate when covered by a shape of a different color
- Can't be pushed by wind
- Is deleted if covered by an enemy (using wind)

Fire and Ice Enemies
- Are deleted by a same element shape
- Can be pushed by wind
- Is deleted if covered by another enemy (using wind)

Rock Enemies
- Are deleted by both fire and ice shapes
- Can't be pushed by wind
- Is deleted if covered by another enemy (using wind)



TIPS
----
- You can place many shapes before executing
- Only turn count matters for score
- Use wind shapes to reposition enemies
- Be careful: tiles can be deactivated if hit by wrong color
- Pushing enemies into other objects destroys them, leaving that enemy in their place
